'''V-3P5''' was a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] owned by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Drextar Pym]]. 'Vee-Three' was responsible for watching over Pym's two sons, [[Kyle Pym|Kyle]] and [[Dirv Pym]]. During an assassination attempt by an [[Unidentified former Imperial storm commando|insane]] former [[Storm commando/Legends|Storm commando]], the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] was shot to pieces, but remained functional and was rescued by a motley crew of [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]].
